ValidationRule.description: All Data ready for Flag AbacusDeptor=True
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, AbacusDebtor__c = True,
OR( ISBLANK (BillingZip__c), ISBLANK (BillingCity__c), ISBLANK (TEXT (CurrencyIsoCode)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Invoice Receiver Account is not complete. Please adjust in a new tab to complete data and then save again. (ACM008)
